source.note: Adapted from a user-provided luxury digital magazine knowledge-card prompt. The prompt listed 29 entries, with Memphis appearing twice; Qiaomu treats them as separate variants.

styles.label: Magazine Art Direction

source.readme_summary: Luxury digital magazine art direction adapted for PPT, knowledge cards, editorial essays, and visual previews.

avoid_for: exam courseware requiring maximum projection clarity
charts that need plain evidence-first treatment

typography.display: Noto Serif CJK SC / Didot-like high-contrast serif
typography.ppt_fallback: Noto Serif CJK SC or Songti SC for editorial Chinese display, Noto Sans CJK SC / PingFang SC for body, Inter / Aptos for Latin
typography.headline_treatment: magazine headline hierarchy: large claim title, concise deck/subtitle, pull quote, folio/caption scale

slide_patterns.name: cover_issue
slide_patterns.layout: full-bleed or paper-canvas cover with oversized headline, issue/date mark, and one image or typographic focal object

slide_patterns.name: feature_spread
slide_patterns.layout: headline plus deck, one strong proof object, and editorial sidebar

slide_patterns.name: pull_quote
slide_patterns.layout: large quotation, source/date folio, minimal supporting note

slide_patterns.name: editor_note
slide_patterns.layout: compact marginal note beside image/chart/proof object

slide_patterns.name: style_gallery
slide_patterns.layout: 2-4 variant previews using the same content; only for style selection, not final deck mixing

slide_patterns.name: closing_back_page
slide_patterns.layout: single editorial sentence, small source/action mark, generous negative space

layout_rules: Select one primary magazine variant for a production deck; use multiple variants only for a style gallery or preview.
Map card prompt elements to PPT objects: date as folio, title as headline, subtitle as deck, quote as pull quote, key points as sidebar, QR as optional action/source code.
Keep readable text editable in SVG/PPTX/HTML; generated images provide texture, atmosphere, collage, or object context only.
Use ornament, frames, and texture only when they strengthen the editorial page; evidence slides stay readable.
Do not turn every slide into cards. Use magazine spreads, cropped images, pull quotes, folios, and marginalia.
ppt.media_policy: Use source images, generated editorial atmospheres, collage fragments, paper texture, or object photography as context. Do not bake Chinese text, charts, QR codes, or citations into generated images.
ppt.chart_policy: Charts should feel like magazine data graphics: direct labels, strong takeaway, restrained ornament, and enough plot area to read.
ppt.animation_hint: slow editorial fade or page-turn rhythm; avoid distracting HUD/glitch effects unless the selected variant requires it
ppt.speaker_note_hint: Use notes for the editorial rationale, source context, and why this page exists.

styles.description_summary: A high-end digital magazine art-direction system for PPT: editorial headline hierarchy, pull quotes, folios, sidebar notes, image-as-context, and luxury/experimental style variants adapted from a user-provided prompt.

variants.label: 大胆现代 / Bold Modern
variants.use_for: manifesto, launch title, strong social preview

variants.label: 优雅复古 / Elegant Vintage
variants.avoid_when: the topic needs modern product precision

variants.label: 日式极简 / Japanese Minimalism
variants.avoid_when: too much material must be shown

variants.label: 后现代解构 / Postmodern Deconstruction
variants.avoid_when: brand trust or readability matters most

variants.label: 黑金属 / Black Metal
variants.use_for: dark ritual, extreme moodboard, art critique

variants.label: 瑞士国际主义解构 / Deconstructed Swiss
variants.avoid_when: the layout system is already complex

variants.label: 极端极简 / Extreme Minimalism
variants.avoid_when: the slide lacks a proof object

variants.label: 新未来主义 / Neo-Futurism
variants.avoid_when: organic curves would distract from labels

variants.label: 超现实数字拼贴 / Surrealist Digital Collage
variants.avoid_when: the image might be mistaken for evidence

variants.label: 新巴洛克数字 / Neo-Baroque Digital
variants.avoid_when: data and labels need quiet space

variants.label: 液态数字形态 / Liquid Digital Morphism
新表现主义数据可视化 / Neo-Expressionist Data Visualization
孟菲斯详版 / Memphis Design Full
variants.avoid_when: the brief already has many colors

variants.label: 德国表现主义 / German Expressionism
variants.avoid_when: the slide should feel calm or trustworthy
